title: UnOredinary (Legacy)
body:
> ⚠️ **This version is discontinued! A major rewrite is now live with full refactored code, renamed ores, and improved compatibility.**

> Get the [new version](https://modrinth.com/mod/unoredinary)

![Mod Banner](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/3813c5703669d2bf5b7193a904c1badce18c04ea_0.webp)

## Description
**UnOredinary** is a Minecraft mod that adds a range of new ores to the game, each designed with unique characteristics and applications. These ores can be mined, processed, and crafted into tools, equipment, or decorative blocks.

### Features
- New Ores, tools and armors with unique effect
- New building blocks such as ice bricks
- New structures and vanilla structure vriant

### Ores' Descriptions:
<details>
<summary>Spoiler</summary>
  
**Hemocrylic ore**:

Rare ores that can be found in ice biomes such as frozen ocean.
You can use it to craft Frosteel Ingot with Iron Ingot, which can be used to upgrade your iron tier weapon/tools to frosteel tier weapon/tools (frosteel is stronger than irons but weaker than diamonds).


**Cryostone ore** (not finished):

Ores that can be found in any cold biome.
They are kinda similar to redstone, you can use it as redstone.

**Luminite ore**:

Ores that can only be found in lush caves.
They will drop luminite crystals that can be crafted into Luminthium Ingot with the combination of Copper Ingot. You can then make luminthium tools/armors (roughly the same level as iron).

**Solarite ore**:

Ores that can only be found inside of lava pool below y level = 0 (sometimes they're on the surface). It's **EXTREMELY HARD TO FIND**. You can use it to craft solarite tools/armors.

**Ruby ore**:

Ores that can be found everywhere, it's literally red diamonds, don't really have some unique thig, but they're a little bit stronger than diamonds.


</details>

### Tools/armors' Descriptions:

<details>
<summary>Spoiler</summary>

**Frosteel**:

If you want to create frosteel tools or armors, the only way is to get the frosteel upgrade smithing template from frozen tombs (new structure that generate in cold biomes), you can combine it with iron tools/armors and froteel ingot.

Frosteel tools deal more damage in cold biomes. If you're in an extremely cold biome, its damage will be amplified. The frosteel pickaxe can mine a 3x3 area if you are mining ices. With frosteel armors, you can also walk on the water, and you get no freeze damage.

**Luminthium**:

You need to combine luminite crystals with copper ingot to get the luminthium ingot. Then, create the tools/armors just like all others.

If you wear the luminthium helmet, you will get night vision effect. They will also mark the enemies in a certain radius.

**Solarite**:

You can create solarite tools/armors just like the others.

Solarite tools will set the enemy that you attack on fire and deal extra fire damage. Solarite pickaxe will automatically smelt the ores that you mined. If you wear a full set of solarite armors, you will be immune to fire.

</details>

------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

If you want to suggest a new feature or report a bug, you can either join my discord sever or go to the github page. 

Also available on CurseForge. Feel free to use in any modpack.
